kw.name: Register Keyword To Run On Failure
kw.msg: Capture Screenshot On Failure will be run on failure.
kw.doc: Sets the keyword to be executed when an AppiumLibrary keyword fails.

test.doc: Verify error is shown when a registered email is submitted with the wrong temporary password (m2.1.42) Uses javier1@mailsac.com as the account expected to have a temporary password assigned. Update the email/password variables if a dedicated temp-password account is available.

test.doc:
During the 5-minute cooldown, even correct credentials must be rejected: "Incorrect email or password. Too many attempts -- please try again in 5 minutes."
Pre-conditions: MAILSAC_EMAIL is currently blocked.

test.name: TC_M2.1_040 - Verify Failed Attempt Counter Resets To Zero After Successful Login

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into the log.
Runs the specified keyword and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Run Keyword If
kw.arg: Could not capture screenshot — no active Appium session
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

test.doc:
After 4 failed login attempts, a successful login resets the counter. The user can then fail 5 more times before being blocked again — confirming the counter was fully reset after the successful login.
Pre-conditions: MAILSAC_EMAIL is NOT currently blocked.
